summary: Wobbling stereo mix makes the recording hard to listen to despite no comments on performance
review: The sole review criticizes the audio, describing a constant wobble between left and right channels that renders the tape difficult to enjoy. No musical highlights or band performance notes are provided, so the show itself cannot be evaluated.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, negative review focusing on severe recording issues; no positive musical feedback to offset the poor audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer reports constant left‑right wobble and overall difficulty listening; suggests a flawed stereo mix or bad tape transfer.
